ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_code" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant in the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session ended */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used by the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "participant_code" TEXT /* Code to identify the participant across sessions */,
  "demographics" TEXT /* Demographic information of the participant */,
  "consent_status" TEXT /* Status of the participant's consent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant record was last updated */,
  "last_session_date" TEXT /* Date of the participant's last session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pages" (
  "page_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each page */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "page_name" TEXT /* Name of the page */,
  "page_index" INTEGER /* Index of the page in the application */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the page record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the page record was last updated */,
  "page_type" TEXT /* Type of page (e.g., landing page, form, content page) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("page_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pages_app_name FOREIGN KEY ("app_name") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_pages" (
  "session_page_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session-page interaction */,
  "session_code" TEXT /* Code of the session */,
  "page_id" INTEGER /* ID of the page visited */,
  "epoch_time" TEXT /* Epoch timestamp of the interaction */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Round number of the interaction */,
  "timeout_happened" INTEGER /* Indicates if a timeout occurred during the interaction */,
  "is_wait_page" INTEGER /* Indicates if the page is a wait page */,
  "interaction_count" INTEGER /* Number of interactions on the page during the session */,
  "page_view_duration" INTEGER /* Total time spent on the page in milliseconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_page_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_pages_page_id FOREIGN KEY ("page_id") REFERENCES pages ("page_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_pages_session_code FOREIGN KEY ("session_code") REFERENCES sessions ("session_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the application */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application record was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the participant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the demographic record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the demographic record was last updated */,
  "income_range" TEXT /* Income range of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "consents" (
  "consent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consent entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date when consent was given */,
  "consent_type" TEXT /* Type of consent given */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the consent record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the consent record was last updated */,
  "consent_expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the consent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consents_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "session_page_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session-page interaction */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., click, scroll) */,
  "element_id" TEXT /* ID of the element interacted with */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the interaction in milliseconds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction record was last updated */,
  "interaction_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_session_page_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_page_id") REFERENCES session_pages ("session_page_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance metric record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance metric record was last updated */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "session_code" TEXT /* Code of the session where the issue occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "reported_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the issue was reported */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., Open, Closed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the issue record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the issue record was last updated */,
  "resolved_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the issue was resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes about how the issue was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_session_code FOREIGN KEY ("session_code") REFERENCES sessions ("session_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment record was last updated */,
  "comment_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_comments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_comments_comment_by FOREIGN KEY ("comment_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was last updated */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed during the access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log entry was last updated */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the access log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
